title: Happiness and Depression
description: Your character now has a happiness meter. Stay in darkness too long and it drains. Get too sad and you get debuffs. Mine happiness ore and craft pills to feel better!
body:
# Happiness and Depression

Your character now has a happiness meter that drains in darkness and restores in sunlight.

## Features

- **Happiness Meter**: Drains slowly in darkness, restores in light
- **Mood Effects**: Get speed/haste when euphoric, slowness/mining fatigue when sad
- **Happiness Ore**: New ore that spawns like coal, mine it for Raw Happiness
- **Happiness Pills**: Smelt raw happiness into pills, eat them to restore mood
- **HUD Display**: See your current happiness level on screen

## Mood Levels

- **Euphoric (90+)**: Speed + Haste buffs
- **Normal**: No effects
- **Sad**: Slowness + Mining Fatigue
- **Depressed**: Slowness II, Mining Fatigue II, Weakness

## Community

**Join our Discord:** https://discord.gg/RPTCAcGwKa

Requires Fabric API and Architectury.
